ddls:
CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraintKey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "constraintType" TEXT /* Type of constraint (FK for foreign key, PK for primary key) */,
  "constraintName" TEXT /* Name of the constraint */,
  "tableName" TEXT /* Name of the table where the constraint is defined */,
  "tableKey" INTEGER /* Key of the table where the constraint is defined */,
  "referencedTable" TEXT /* Referenced table for foreign key constraints */,
  "constraintColumns" TEXT /* List of columns involved in the constraint */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constraint was created */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* User who created the constraint */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constraint was last updated */,
  "updatedBy" TEXT /* User who last updated the constraint */,
  "dbms" TEXT /* DBMS type (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraintKey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraints_referencedTable FOREIGN KEY ("referencedTable") REFERENCES tables ("tableName"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraints_tableName FOREIGN KEY ("tableName") REFERENCES tables ("tableName")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "tableKey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "tableName" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "tableColumns" TEXT /* List of columns in the table */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was created */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* User who created the table */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was last updated */,
  "updatedBy" TEXT /* User who last updated the table */,
  "dbms" TEXT /* DBMS type (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tableKey")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexes" (
  "indexKey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "tableName" TEXT /* Name of the table where the index is defined */,
  "indexName" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "indexColumns" TEXT /* List of columns included in the index */,
  "indexType" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., B-tree, hash) */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was created */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* User who created the index */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was last updated */,
  "updatedBy" TEXT /* User who last updated the index */,
  "dbms" TEXT /* DBMS type (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indexKey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexes_tableName FOREIGN KEY ("tableName") REFERENCES tables ("tableName")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userKey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "userName" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, end-user) */,
  "passwordHash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "lastLogin" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* User who created the user */,
  "updatedAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "updatedBy" TEXT /* User who last updated the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userKey")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "accessKey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "userKey" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database schema */,
  "tableName" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "accessDate" TEXT /* Date when the database schema was accessed */,
  "accessType" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ipAddress" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database schema */,
  "userAgent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the database schema */,
  "requestMethod" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "responseStatus" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  "requestDuration" INTEGER /* Duration of the request in milliseconds */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "createdBy" TEXT /* User who created the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessKey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tableName FOREIGN KEY ("tableName") REFERENCES tables ("tableName"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_userKey FOREIGN KEY ("userKey") REFERENCES users ("userKey")
)
